name: Project Structure, Execution Primitives, Verification
intent: Decompose project into typed JSON blocks, add forEach and command step types, add verification as typed results, and build a self-implementing workflow demo.

success_criteria.criterion: Project decomposed into typed JSON blocks with schemas
forEach step iterates over arrays, binds each element via as:
command step runs shell operations and captures output as typed JSON
verify step produces truths, artifacts, requirements_coverage, criteria_results, gaps
Self-implementing workflow demo runs on spec 27

specs.name: Project Contracts and Blocks
specs.intent: Define JSON schemas and populate typed blocks from master doc content — project becomes structured data that templates compose from
acceptance_criteria: Content from master doc fully represented

specs.name: forEach and command Step Types
specs.intent: Add forEach (iterate over array, bind each element, collect outputs) and command (run shell operation, capture stdout as typed data) step types

specs.name: Verification as Typed Results
specs.intent: Add verify step type with truths/evidence, artifact checks, requirements coverage, criteria evaluation, gaps, and human verification items
acceptance_criteria: Gaps trigger retry or blocker artifacts

specs.name: Self-Implementing Workflow Demo
specs.intent: Workflow reads project blocks, decomposes phase spec into plans, executes plans, verifies results — project implements itself
acceptance_criteria: Plan decomposition produces informed implementation plans
